tabs.workDescription: Project workflow, git, agents, and provider defaults
tabs.advancedDescription: Memory, security, browser, sandbox, and power features

project.selectToEdit: Select a project to configure its settings.

agent.title: Agent
agent.defaultAgentHint: Agent to use when not specified
agent.retryCountHint: Number of retries on transient failures

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.maxSpecificationsHint: Maximum number of specifications per task

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.moreLanguagesComing: More languages coming soon. English is currently the only supported language.

translations.title: Translation Customization
translations.description: Customize terminology and text throughout the application. Changes apply after page reload.
translations.terminologyHint: Replace terms across all translations (case-insensitive). Example: 'Task' → 'Ticket'
translations.keyOverridesHint: Override specific translation keys for power users. Example: 'nav.dashboard' → 'Home'
translations.reloadNotice: Changes will take effect after page reload.
translations.confirmClearGlobal: This will clear all global translation customizations. Are you sure?
translations.confirmClearProject: This will clear all project-specific translation customizations. Are you sure?
